modules.name: Module 1: Server vs Client Components, Hydration & Data Fetching

topics.title: React Server Components
subtopics: RSC execution environments, zero client-side bundle size, serializable formats data flows

topics.title: Client Components
subtopics: use client directive, hydration entry points, interactivity boundaries, client-only code wrappers

topics.title: Hydration Mismatch
subtopics: Hydration mismatch diagnostics (window/document references in render, time differences)

topics.title: Data Fetching
subtopics: Fetch API extends, caching options (force-cache, no-store), revalidate durations layout updates

topics.title: Streaming HTML
subtopics: Suspense boundaries rendering, streaming partial HTML sections, loading state screens

modules.name: Module 2: Routing Mechanics, Middleware & Edge Functions

topics.title: App Router
subtopics: File-based routing (page, layout, template layout), nested route layouts state preservation

topics.title: Dynamic Routes
subtopics: Dynamic segments (slugs), generateStaticParams pre-rendering math, catch-all routing

topics.title: Middleware Routing
subtopics: Edge runtime middleware redirects, header writes, cookie checks, routing interceptions

topics.title: Edge Runtime & Serverless Functions
subtopics: Serverless edge function parameters, V8 sandbox executions, database connection limits

topics.title: API Routes
subtopics: Route handlers mapping (GET, POST, etc), response serialization structures, CORS handling

modules.name: Module 3: Server Actions, Form Mutations & Security

topics.title: Server Actions
subtopics: use server functions actions, form submissions integrations, client-side mutations triggers

topics.title: Form Mutations
subtopics: FormAction hooks, useFormStatus state checks, useActionState input transitions handling

topics.title: Action Security
subtopics: Parameter authorization checks, validation logic injections (Zod schemas), csrf safety

topics.title: Optimistic Updates
subtopics: useOptimistic hook updates rendering, database confirmations, rollback state maps

topics.title: Revalidations API
subtopics: revalidatePath parameters, revalidateTag tag caches clearance, layout cache overrides

modules.name: Module 4: Rendering Strategies (SSG vs ISR) & Hydration

topics.title: Static Site Generation (SSG)
subtopics: Static builds pre-rendering, CDN caching, build-time configurations

topics.title: Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR)
subtopics: Background updates, stale-while-revalidate caches, paths update frequencies

topics.title: Dynamic Rendering
subtopics: Server Side Rendering (SSR) runtime render loops, dynamic data headers triggers

topics.title: Static Export
subtopics: Next export configs rules, client-only builds, server code exclusions constraints

topics.title: Partial Prerendering (PPR)
subtopics: Combined static shell + streaming dynamic components execution layout

modules.name: Module 5: Next.js Performance, Image Optimizations & Bundles

topics.title: Image Optimizations
subtopics: Next Image component layouts, width/height aspect ratios, WebP/AVIF auto formats

topics.title: Script & Fonts
subtopics: Font optimizations (next/font local, google), script loading strategies (beforeInteractive, lazy)

topics.title: Bundle Analysis
subtopics: Webpack bundle analyzer outputs, code-splitting chunks size allocations, dynamic imports adjustments

topics.title: Production Deployment
subtopics: Standalone builds configuration, multi-stage Docker builds optimizations, server configurations

topics.title: Analytics & Web Vitals
subtopics: Core Web Vitals report configurations (LCP, FID, CLS), monitoring hooks
